Multiple reports of trees down near M-28 and M-123 intersection. Power pole damaged by tree on line. Around 1300 people without power for roughly 3 to 5 hours.

Newberry Country Club / Woodland Grill shared a statement on their Facebook page with a handful of pictures documenting the numerous trees down across the golf course. Their outdoor patio furniture was also blown down the hill away from the building.
Report on Facebook provided two pictures of tree damage from the winds. One fairly large tree was knocked down close to a home. The other was of a larger branch broken off a tree.
